mapper.select: SELECT setting_key AS "settingKey", setting_value AS "settingValue", updated_at AS "updatedAt" FROM user_settings ORDER BY setting_key
SELECT setting_key AS "settingKey", setting_value AS "settingValue", updated_at AS "updatedAt" FROM user_settings WHERE setting_key = #{key}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_settings (setting_key, setting_value, updated_at) VALUES (#{settingKey}, #{settingValue}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON CONFLICT (setting_key) DO UPDATE SET setting_value = EXCLUDED.setting_value, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO chat_history (session_id, role, content) VALUES
(#{m.sessionId}, #{m.role}, #{m.content})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chat_history WHERE created_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - (#{retentionDays}::int * INTERVAL '1 day')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_history WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
